events.detail: CoreDNS forward plugin reporting elevated SERVFAIL; upstream node-local resolver 169.254.20.10:53 not responding to health checks in us-west-2a/2b
cluster-wide name resolution failures elevated; multiple namespaces affected (payments, checkout, email, ml)
platform/infra paged upstream DNS provider; mitigation: point CoreDNS forward at secondary resolver 10.96.0.11 / 1.1.1.1
